auth.setMissingEnvVars: Set the missing environment variables in `.env.local`, then restart the dev server.
auth.takingLonger: Taking longer than expected. Check that the Keycloak URL is reachable and the realm/client are correct, then refresh the page.
auth.signInWithKeycloak: Please sign in with your Keycloak account to continue.

app.title: Diamond Manager Scheduler
app.subtitle: Scheduler
app.scheduleKeyHelp: A unique identifier for this schedule (letters, numbers, hyphens). Used in embed URLs and ICS subscriptions.
app.useSubscriptionUrl: Use this URL to subscribe to the schedule in Google Calendar, Outlook, or other calendar apps.

schedule.noPublishedSchedule: No published schedule found. Please publish the schedule first using the Publish button.
schedule.onlyActiveSchedules: Only active schedules can be loaded.
schedule.accessDenied: Schedule not found or access denied.
schedule.selectScheduleToLoad: Please select a schedule to load.
schedule.selectLeagueFirst: Please select a league first before scheduling games.
schedule.createLeagueFirst: Please create a league first before adding games.
schedule.removeAllConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete ALL {{count}} game(s)?

This action cannot be undone.
schedule.noGamesToRemove: There are no games to remove.
schedule.replaceScheduleConfirm: This will replace the current schedule for this view. Continue?
schedule.appendScheduleConfirm: This will add the new games to your existing calendar. Continue?

gameForm.noLeagues: No leagues available. Create a league first.
gameForm.postponedHint: Change the date/time above to reschedule, then set status back to Scheduled.
gameForm.validationAtLeastOneLeague: Please select at least one league.
gameForm.validationSelectBothTeams: Please select both a home team and an away team.
gameForm.validationDifferentTeams: Home and Away teams must be different.
gameForm.validationDeleteGame: Are you sure you want to delete this game?

calendar.tryChangingFilter: Try changing the filter or generating a new schedule.

holdingArea.title: Games in Edit Mode
holdingArea.emptyHint: Drag games here or use the "Move to Holding Area" button

league.editSubtitle: Update branding, settings, and modify the team roster for this league.
league.createSubtitle: Set up your league details, configure branding, and manage your roster of teams manually.
league.shortNameHelp: Used in embed views where space is limited.
league.coverImageHelp: Used as background for game cards · Wide image recommended · 1280 × 720 px or larger
league.announcementPlaceholder: e.g. Playoffs start June 20 — check the schedule for bracket updates.
league.announcementHelp: Shown as a banner in all embedded views for this league. Max 500 characters.
league.leagueCreated: League "{{name}}" created! You can now generate a schedule for it.
league.needTwoTeamsAlert: Please add at least 2 teams to the league.

teams.name: Name
teams.noTeamsHint: Add a team manually or create a league in the League Creator.

scheduler.title: Game Scheduler
scheduler.subtitle: Create a balanced, mathematically generated season schedule instantly.
scheduler.backToBackNote: For back-to-back series (e.g. Sat/Sun), select the Start Day below (e.g. Saturday). Game 2 will automatically be scheduled for the following day.
scheduler.alternateGamesNote: Alternate Games: Games alternate home/away (Game 1 at Team 1, Game 2 at Team 2, etc.). Games are scheduled on consecutive days starting from the selected start day.
scheduler.backToBackGamesNote: Back-to-Back Games: All games are played at Team 1's home field on consecutive days. Games are scheduled on consecutive days starting from the selected start day.
scheduler.matchupByStandingsNote: Teams are picked automatically based on current standings at schedule generation time. Select the standings position for each matchup.
scheduler.standingsPositionUnavailable: One or more standings positions could not be resolved. Make sure the league has enough completed games.
scheduler.needTwoTeams: The selected league needs at least 2 teams to generate a schedule.
scheduler.selectGameDay: Please select at least one day of the week for games.
scheduler.addSeriesMatchupFirst: Please add at least one series matchup.
scheduler.conflictsNote: The following teams are scheduled to play more than once on the same day. This can happen with small team counts and double-header modes. Review the calendar and adjust as needed.
scheduler.goToLeagueCreator: Go to the League Creator to build a league first.
scheduler.errorGenerating: An error occurred while generating the schedule.

embed.title: Embed Calendar
embed.subtitle: Generate embed code to display your published schedule on WordPress, Squarespace, or any website.
embed.publishedScheduleInfo: You must load a published schedule before generating embed code. Only active, published schedules can be embedded. Go to the user menu and select "Load Published Schedule" to load an official schedule.
embed.selectActiveSchedule: Select an active published schedule to embed. Only active schedules are available.
embed.loadScheduleFirst: Load a published schedule first to enable embed code generation.
embed.seriesNote: Shows playoff bracket games grouped by series name (e.g. Semifinal, Final). Only games with a Series Name are displayed. Select a specific league above for a focused bracket.
embed.standingsNote: Standings are calculated from completed games (status: final or completed) with recorded scores. Select a specific league above for a focused standings table.
embed.noScheduleComment:
// Load a published schedule and select it above to generate embed code.
// Only active, published schedules can be embedded.
embed.selectScheduleComment: Select a published schedule above to generate embed code.
embed.teamDeepLinkHelp: Share this URL so fans can embed or bookmark just this team's schedule:
embed.previewDescription: Live preview of how the embed will look
embed.step1: Configure your filters and settings above
embed.step3: Paste it into your WordPress page/post (use HTML block or code editor)
embed.step4: Or paste it into any website that supports iframes
embed.feature1: Shows all game information including series names (Semifinal, Final, etc.)
embed.feature2: Displays team logos, game times, and locations
embed.feature3: Supports filtering by league, category, and team
embed.feature4: Calendar view supports both grid and list layouts
embed.feature5: Game bar shows upcoming scheduled games in a horizontal timeline
embed.feature6: League standings shows W, L, PCT, GB, RS, RA, and DIFF for each team

embedStyler.title: Customize Embed Styles
embedStyler.customCssHelp: Add this CSS to your website's stylesheet or in a <style> tag to apply these styles to the embed.

standings.title: League Standings
standings.noGamesYet: No completed games yet. Standings will appear here once games are finalized.

playoff.noBracketHint: Assign a Series Name to games (e.g. "Semifinal", "Final") when scheduling to build the bracket automatically.
playoff.title: Playoff Bracket

importExport.noMatchingTeams: No matching teams found. Ensure Team Names match your roster.

help.title: Help & Guide
help.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Diamond Manager Scheduler — from setting up your first league to embedding live standings on your website.
